nasb.text: to those who by perseverance in doing good seek for glory and honor and immortality, eternal life;

esv.text: to those who by patience in well-doing seek for glory and honor and immortality, he will give eternal life;

cnv.text: 以永生報答那些耐心行善、尋求榮耀尊貴和不朽的人，

ccb.text: 凡是恒心行善、寻求荣耀、尊贵和永恒福分的人，祂要把永生赐给他们；

csbs.text: 对那些恒心行善，寻求荣耀、尊贵、不朽的，就以永恒的生命回报他们；
